basic_details.job_title: IOCL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Visiting Specialist/ Superspecialist Doctors Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Oil Corporation (Indian Oil Corporation) Visiting Specialist/Superspecialist Doctors Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IOCL. Have been announced through the IOCL Visiting Specialist/Superspecialist Doctors Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in relevant fields, DM/SS DNB Cardiology/Neurology/Nephrology/Gastroenterology/Endocrinology/Pulmonology.
qualification.details: Medicine: Post Graduate Degree in Medicine with Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree. Pediatrics: Post Graduate Degree in Pediatrics with Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree. Clinical Cardiologist: PGDCC/PGDCCP (Non- Invasive) with Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree. Orthopedics: Post Graduate Degree in Orthopedics with Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree. Sonology/Radiology: Post Graduate Degree/ Diploma in Radiodiagnosis/Radiology with Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree/ Minimum 03 years of relevant experience post PG Diploma. ENT: Post Graduate Degree in ENT with Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree. Dermatology: Post Graduate Degree in Dermatology with Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree. Eye: Post Graduate Degree in Ophthalmology (Eye) with Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree. Psychiatry: Post Graduate Degree in Psychiatry with Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree. Cardiology: DM/SS DNB Cardiology. Neurology: DM/SS DNB Neurology. Nephrology: DM/SS DNB Nephrology. Gastroenterology: DM/SS DNB Gastroenterology. Endocrinology: DM/SS DNB Endocrinology. Pulmonology: DM/SS DNB Pulmonology.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 5700/- per visit of 2 hours, Rs. 6500/- per visit of 2 hours
salary_details.details: Medicine, Pediatrics, Clinical Cardiologist, Orthopedics, Sonology/Radiology, ENT, Dermatology, Eye, Psychiatry: Rs. 5700/- per visit of 2 hours Cardiology, Neurology, Nephrology, Gastroenterology, Endocrinology, Pulmonology: Rs. 6500/- per visit of 2 hours

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IOCL?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for IOCL Visiting Specialist/Superspecialist Doctors is scheduled for 26 May 2026. Candidates must ensure they reach the venue on time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the IOCL recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligibility criteria include Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in relevant fields, and for specific superspecialist roles, DM/SS DNB in Cardiology, Neurology, Nephrology, Gastroenterology, Endocrinology, or Pulmonology is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary varies: Rs. 5700/- per visit of 2 hours for general specialist posts and Rs. 6500/- per visit of 2 hours for superspecialist posts.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring their resume, two passport-size photographs, original documents related to qualification and experience, and one set of self-attested photocopies of all documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Begusarai, Bihar, with the pincode 851117.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any specific experience requirements?
faq.answer: Yes, for most specialist posts, a minimum of 2 years of relevant experience post PG Degree is required. For Sonology/Radiology, specific experience criteria apply for PG Degree and Diploma holders.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for IOCL recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this job?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Begusarai, Bihar. Candidates from other states are generally eligible if they meet the qualification and experience criteria, but they should confirm this with the official notification.
